title: chenopodium cornutum
intro: Chenopodium cornutum, also known as desert heliotrope, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Chenopodium cornutum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a versatile plant for various medicinal applications.
